steps.t: You have chosen to compete in a competition to help determine the best forester in all of Chetwood - right now. Speak to the judge to let them know th…
You first need to collect an axe so that you can chop wood and then cure skins. Hurry now.
Log piles along Old Bauman's hovel are set up for harvesting. Take your axe and collect five stacks of unrefined wood from the piles there.
Make your way to the competition table beneath the tree in the centre of the camp and refine wood with the forester's axe.
You refined the wood, successfully. Now, collect hides from the bear carcasses behind Bauman's hovel.
With the skins collected, it is time to move on to the curing them. Make your way to the stone wall on the far side of the camp and cure skins at the …
With the hides completed, you now need to make your way to the bench beside the house and sample three brews from local taverns.
With those tasty beverages consumed and sloshing in your stomach, the real test begins. Collect a caber.
Carry the caber through the first set of markers in the Chetwood lumberyard.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the next set of red markers.
Carry the caber to the final blue markers to complete the race.
Return to the judge and speak to them about your efforts in the event.
